title: PEPP — Pediatric Education for Prehospital Professionals
subtitle: The Ultimate Provider Course Reviewer
edition: Based on the AAP PEPP, 4th Edition
description: A comprehensive, self-contained study reviewer for Pediatric Education for Prehospital Professionals. Each chapter includes a concise summary, clinical pearls, red flags, common mistakes, memory aids, decision trees, high-yield flashcards, PEPP-style quiz questions, and realistic pediatric scenarios. Built around the Pediatric Assessment Triangle, spanning both BLS- and ALS-level prehospital pediatric care, for EMTs, AEMTs, paramedics, and other prehospital providers.
certification: AAP PEPP Provider (BLS or ALS track)
prerequisites: PALS knowledge helpful but not required

chapters.title: Why Children Are Different: Developmental & Anatomic Considerations
History Taking, Secondary Assessment & Family-Centered Communication
Neurologic Emergencies: Altered Mental Status & Seizures
Children With Special Healthcare Needs & Technology Dependence
EMS Operations: Transport Decisions, Disaster & MCI Triage Involving Children
